nasb.text: And behold, there arose a great storm on the sea, so that the boat was being covered with the waves; but Jesus Himself was asleep.

esv.text: And behold, there arose a great storm on the sea, so that the boat was being swamped by the waves; but he was asleep.

cnv.text: 忽然海上起了狂風，甚至船都被波濤掩蓋，但耶穌卻睡著了。

ccb.text: 忽然，湖面上狂风大作，波涛汹涌，船快要被巨浪吞没，耶稣却在睡觉。

csbs.text: 这时候，忽然湖上起了大风暴，以致波浪盖过了船，耶稣却睡着了。
